data.body: Implemented S6 prompt library + authoring/write-back. New module src/rebar/llm/workflow/prompt_authoring.py (list_prompts/prompt_write_target/save_prompt + PromptWriteError, atomic write via tempfile+os.replace). editor.py endpoints GET /prompts, GET /prompt?id=, POST /prompt/save (token+Host guarded). Bundle: insertionProvider.js (context-pad+palette) + promptLibrary.js (library dropdown + create/edit form + typed insert), rebuilt. Tests: tests/unit/workflow/test_prompt_authoring.py (round-trip golden, all non-happy paths, target detection, list, index regen, endpoint happy/collision/auth) + tests/e2e/test_editor_library.py (self-skipping browser e2e, RAN green here). 285 unit pass, 1 e2e pass, ruff clean. editor.py 582 LOC.
